extraction_metadata.extraction_notes: Table 2 (PK/PD timepoints) for ALXN1840. subsidiary providing finer within-visit timing for the Table 1 PK/PD blood-sampling activity on Days 1/25/29/39. Single activity, timepoint columns -0.5 to 24 h. Marker a (relative to dosing) on the timepoint header (property scope); marker b on the 24 h cell; general Note captured as synthesized note1 (table-scoped). Abbreviation list not captured.

table_metadata.table_title: Table 2: Schedule of Pharmacokinetic and Pharmacodynamic Assessments on Days 1, 25, 29, and 39
table_metadata.table_purpose: Finer within-visit PK/PD sampling timepoints (hours relative to dosing) for the PK/PD blood sampling activity on Days 1, 25, 29, and 39 of Table 1.
table_metadata.notes: Section 1.3, Table 2. Subsidiary to Table 1: provides hour-by-hour PK/PD sampling detail for Days 1, 25, 29, 39. One combined PK+PD activity row; 11 timepoint columns.

schedule_properties.property_comment: Within-visit PK/PD sampling timepoints in hours relative to dosing (0 h): -0.5, 0, 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 8, 12, 24. Applies to Days 1, 25, 29, and 39 of Table 1. Header carries footnote marker a.

activities.activity_name: Blood sampling for PK: Plasma total Mo and PUF-Mo; PD: Plasma total and PUF-Cu, LBC, ceruloplasmin, ceruloplasmin-bound Cu

activity_name_source.cell_text: Blood sampling for PK: Plasma total Mo and PUF-Mo PD: Plasma total and PUF-Cu, LBC, ceruloplasmin, ceruloplasmin-bound Cu

annotations.annotation_text: Time points are relative to dosing (0 hours).
Hour 24 PK/PD sampling is to occur just prior to the next-day dose of ALXN1840.

Windows for PK/PD time points will be defined as ±10% of the nominal time point. On Days 1 and 39, triplicate 12-lead ECG will be collected at 4 hours postdose. When multiple procedures are scheduled to occur at the same time, the following order of events should be strictly adhered to whenever possible: ECG, vital signs, blood sampling (eg, for PK/PD), study intervention administration, and meal.
